consensus_score.reasoning: Claude identified this as an instructional overview video showing multiple FLS tasks rather than a single task performance, with only setup visible for Peg Transfer and no actual transfer activity performed. GPT-4o scored it as a completed task with timing and penalties, but this appears to be a misinterpretation of the video content. Without clear evidence of actual task performance and timing, the task cannot be scored.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's identification of this as an instructional overview rather than a timed performance is more consistent with the video showing multiple different FLS tasks without clear timing boundaries.

gpt_value.description: One object was dropped outside the field of view and was unretrievable.

disagreements.rationale: If no actual task performance occurred as Claude identified, then penalties for lost objects during performance would not apply.
Claude's identification of only setup phase is consistent with the video being an instructional overview rather than a complete task performance.
Without clear task performance and timing, no score can be assigned according to FLS scoring requirements.
